zh.lifeSummary: 當Guðrøðr Óláfsson於1140年出生在曼島時，他的父親King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red60歲，母親Aufrica Of Galloway22歲。他於從1176年到1177年與Findguala Nic Lochlainn結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1187年11月10日在他的家鄉享年47歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭阿吉爾易納。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guðrøðr Óláfsson于1140年出生在曼岛时，他的父亲King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red60岁，母亲Aufrica Of Galloway22岁。他于从1176年到1177年与Findguala Nic Lochlainn结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1187年11月10日在他的家乡享年47岁，埋葬在苏格兰阿吉爾易納。

nameMeanings.name: Óláfsson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Nels.
Americanized form of Norwegian and Danish Olafsen or of its very rare Swedish cognate Olafsson.

variants.name: Olafsen
meanings: Norwegian and Danish: patronymic from the personal name Olaf, from Old Norse Óláfr, Ólafr, variant Óleifr, earlier Anleifr, from proto-Scandinavian elements meaning ‘ancestor’ + ‘heir, descendant’. Olaf (also Olav, in Sweden Olof) has always been one of the most common Scandinavian names; it continued to be popular in the Middle Ages, in part as a result of the fame of Saint Olaf, King of Norway, who brought Christianity to his country c. 1030. This surname is rare in Denmark. Compare Olafson .

en.lifeSummary: When Guðrøðr Óláfsson was born in 1140, in Isle of Man, his father, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, was 60 and his mother, Aufrica Of Galloway, was 22. He married Findguala Nic Lochlainn from 1176 to 1177. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 10 November 1187, in his hometown, at the age of 47, and was buried in Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guðrøðr Óláfsson est né en 1140, à Île de Man, son père, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, avait 60 ans et sa mère, Aufrica Of Galloway, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Findguala Nic Lochlainn du 1176 au 1177. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1187, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans, et a été enterré à Iona, Argyll, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guðrøðr Óláfsson 1140 in Isle of Man geboren wurde, war sein Vater King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red 60 und seine Mutter Aufrica Of Galloway 22. Er hat von 1176 bis 1177 Findguala Nic Lochlainn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 10. November 1187 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Iona, Argyll, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guðrøðr Óláfsson è nato il nel 1140 nel Isola di Man, il suo padre, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, aveva 60 anni e il suo madre, Aufrica Of Galloway, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Findguala Nic Lochlainn da 1176 a 1177. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 10 novembre 1187, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni, e fu sepolto a Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Guðrøðr Óláfssonが1140年にマン島で生まれた時，父King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Redは60歳，母Aufrica Of Gallowayは22歳であった。から1176年まで1177年にFindguala Nic Lochlainnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1187年11月10日に故郷で47歳で死去し，スコットランドアルグイルアイオナにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guðrøðr Óláfsson(이)가 1140년 맨섬에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red(은)는 60세였고, 그의 어머니 Aufrica Of Galloway(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1176년 부터 1177년 까지 Findguala Nic Lochlainn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1187년 11월 10일 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 아그이 이오나에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guðrøðr Óláfsson nasceu em 1140, em Ilha de Man, seu pai, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, tinha 60 anos e sua mãe, Aufrica Of Galloway, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Findguala Nic Lochlainn de 1176 a 1177. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1187, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos, e foi sepultado em Iona, Argyll, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guðrøðr Óláfsson родился в 1140 г. в местности Остров Мэн, его отцу по имени King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red было 60 лет, а матери, которую звали Aufrica Of Galloway, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Findguala Nic Lochlainn с 1176 по 1177. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 10 ноября 1187 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет и был похоронен в местности иона, аргилл, Шотландия.

sm.1176-1177: mai le 1176 e o'o I le 1177

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guðrøðr Óláfsson nació en 1140, en Isla de Man, su papá, King Of Man And The Isles Óláfr Guðrøðarson The Dwarf, Bitling ,The Red, tenía 60 años y su mamá, Aufrica Of Galloway, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Findguala Nic Lochlainn desde 1176 hasta 1177. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1187, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años, y fue sepultado en Iona, Argyll, Scotland.
